channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Ghibli-Style AI Art Raises Ethical Concerns
item.description: Ghibli-style AI art raises ethical concerns about artificial intelligence tools trained on copyrighted creative works and what that means for the future livelihoods of human artists.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Flying Cars Get a Step Closer: Meet CycloTech's Revolutionary BlackBird
item.description: CycloTech, an Austrian aviation company, is making strides in the development of flying cars with its electric vertical take-off and landing vehicle (eVTOL), the BlackBird. This innovative technology boasts unmatched maneuverability, safety features, and a compact design, potentially paving the way for widespread adoption.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
